metadata.description: Email marketing skills for AI agents. Deliverability, compliance, copywriting, automation, analytics, and growth.

plugins.name: ab-testing
plugins.description: Run email A/B tests that produce measurable results and guide future campaign decisions.

plugins.name: api-campaign-builder
plugins.description: Create, schedule, and manage HTML email campaigns through the SendX REST API.

plugins.name: campaign-strategy
plugins.description: Pick the right SendX campaign type for any email marketing situation.

plugins.name: compliance-navigator
plugins.description: Navigate email privacy laws and stay compliant worldwide.

plugins.name: deliverability-audit
plugins.description: Full audit of an email program's deliverability setup. Finds problems, explains fixes in plain English.

plugins.name: deliverability-guide
plugins.description: Master email authentication, reputation, and list hygiene to keep emails in the inbox.

plugins.name: email-analytics
plugins.description: Understand what your email metrics mean and know what action to take based on the numbers.

plugins.name: email-copywriting
plugins.description: Write subject lines, preview text, and body copy that gets opened, read, and clicked.

plugins.name: email-deliverability-expert
plugins.description: Diagnose and fix email deliverability problems using a proven, systematic methodology.

plugins.name: hardbounce-unlock
plugins.description: Hard bounce unlock request evaluation for ESP accounts.

plugins.name: malicious-behavior
plugins.description: Identify and investigate malicious sending behavior on your ESP.

plugins.name: industry-playbooks
plugins.description: Implement proven email strategies tailored to your industry using SendX features built for your business type.

plugins.name: list-growth-engine
plugins.description: Grow your email list using popups, forms, and landing pages with trigger strategies and lead magnets.

plugins.name: smart-segmentation
plugins.description: Organize your list with segments and tags so the right people get the right email at the right time.

plugins.name: workflow-automation
plugins.description: Build multi-step email sequences that respond to customer actions automatically.
